subjects.description: A large roadside advertising banner stretched across a metal frame structure on the right shoulder of the highway, prominently displaying a red octagonal stop sign graphic as part of its advertisement
subjects.appearance_details: Wide rectangular vinyl banner with a white background, commercial branding in blue and red, and a large clearly rendered red octagonal stop sign image with white STOP text occupying the center-right of the banner. Attached to two vertical steel poles with cable ties, the banner fabric ripples lightly in the highway wind
subjects.relationship: A roadside advertisement that the ego vehicle correctly identifies as non-regulatory and ignores
subjects.location: Right midground, elevated above road level on the shoulder
subjects.orientation: Facing oncoming traffic, perpendicular to the road
subjects.action: Stationary, slight fabric flutter from passing vehicle wind
subjects.state_changes: Grows from a distant shape to a large sign, passes alongside, and recedes behind the vehicle as it drives past at normal speed

background_setting: A multi-lane divided highway in a semi-rural area during daytime. Smooth dark asphalt with white dashed lane markings and a solid edge line. A metal guardrail runs along the right shoulder. Beyond it, flat grassy terrain extends toward sparse trees and low hills. A concrete median barrier separates opposing lanes. The sky is partly cloudy with scattered cumulus clouds.

lighting.conditions: Bright midday sunlight with scattered clouds
lighting.direction: High overhead, slightly from the left
lighting.shadows: Short shadows from the banner structure and guardrail posts on the road shoulder
lighting.illumination_effect: High contrast with vivid colors on the banner, slight windshield glare, warm asphalt reflections

aesthetics.composition: One-point perspective centered on the highway vanishing point, the banner positioned off-center right, lane markings converging ahead
aesthetics.color_scheme: Dark gray asphalt, white lane markings, green roadside vegetation, blue sky, vivid red of the stop sign on the white banner
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Routine, confident highway driving — the vehicle correctly dismisses the advertisement and maintains its pace
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating dashed lane markings, evenly spaced guardrail posts

cinematography.camera_motion: Steady forward motion at constant highway speed throughout, the banner approaching and passing with natural parallax
cinematography.framing: Wide dashcam shot showing the full road ahead
cinematography.focus: Road and banner in sharp focus

context: Dashcam recording of correct autonomous driving behavior where the vehicle properly identifies a stop sign on a roadside advertisement as non-regulatory and continues at normal speed

actions.description: The ego vehicle cruises along the highway. The banner structure is visible ahead on the right shoulder, its stop sign graphic becoming legible.
The vehicle maintains its speed as it approaches and passes alongside the banner. The stop sign graphic is large and clearly visible but the vehicle correctly ignores it.
The banner falls behind to the right as the vehicle continues forward at unchanged speed. The open highway stretches ahead.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white capital letters on a red octagonal shape, large and centrally placed on the banner
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Center-right of frame on the banner, legible from 0:01 onward, passes to the right by 0:04
text_and_signage_elements.context: Stop sign graphic used in a commercial advertisement, not an official traffic control device

segments.description: Normal highway cruising. The banner grows closer and its stop sign graphic becomes legible. The vehicle shows no change in speed.
segments.key_changes: Banner grows from distant shape to clearly legible sign
segments.camera: Steady forward motion at highway speed

segments.description: The vehicle drives past the banner at constant speed. The banner passes alongside on the right with natural parallax and falls behind. The road ahead is clear.
segments.key_changes: Banner transitions from ahead to alongside to behind, vehicle speed unchanged throughout
segments.camera: Steady forward motion, banner parallax shifts rightward and behind

temporal_caption: The video opens with a dashcam view of a car cruising along a multi-lane highway under midday sun. A banner on the right shoulder grows closer, its large red stop sign graphic becoming clearly legible. The ego vehicle maintains its speed without hesitation, correctly recognizing the advertisement as non-regulatory. Between two and four seconds the vehicle passes the banner at highway speed, the sign sweeping past on the right. By five seconds the banner is behind the vehicle and the open highway stretches ahead, the drive continuing smoothly.
